creator: des@flood.ping.uio.no
text:
Dag-Erling Smorgrav <des@ewox.org> writes:
> Ports that depend on Xaw3d won't build because the Xaw3d's library version
> number is now 7 instead of 6. What's more, the PLIST for the Xaw3d port
> incorrectly lists lib/libXaw3d.so.6.1 instead of lib/libXaw3d.so.7.

Update: it only seems to happen when running XFree86 4.0, so it may
not be as bad as I originally thought.

DES
-- 
Dag-Erling Smorgrav - des@flood.ping.uio.no
